title: Kvantemigrasjon (Quantum migration) - landing page
description: NSM section on quantum migration: advice and recommendations for how Norwegian organisations should transition to quantum-safe IT systems and cryptographic solutions.

title: Hva er kvantemigrasjon? (What is quantum migration?)
description: NSM explainer: quantum computers could break today's encryption; it is now possible and important to plan an organisation's migration to post-quantum cryptography.

title: Kvantemigrasjon - veileder (Quantum migration - guide)
description: NSM guide introducing the issues and giving advice on how organisations get started with quantum migration; aimed at system owners handling sensitive information (telecom, finance, health, energy, petroleum).

title: Sårbare algoritmer - kvantemigrasjon (Vulnerable algorithms)
description: NSM overview of algorithms in use that will be vulnerable to cryptographically relevant quantum computers (RSA, ECDH, ECDSA, DH).

title: Oversiktsrapport for kryptografiske ressurser og systemer (Overview report for cryptographic resources and systems)
description: NSM guidance on what to report about cryptographic resources/systems vulnerable to cryptographically relevant quantum computers as part of quantum migration.

title: Kvantemigrasjon Veileder (PDF) - Veileder i kvanteflytting fra NSM
description: NSM PDF guide on quantum migration (kvanteflytting / kvantemigrasjon) to quantum-safe cryptography.

title: Kryptografiske anbefalinger (Cryptographic recommendations)
description: NSM cryptographic recommendations; includes preparing for quantum computers by creating a plan for migration to quantum-resistant cryptography.

title: Cryptographic Recommendations - a guidance document from NSM (English)
description: English-language NSM cryptographic recommendations; recommends creating and implementing a plan for successful migration to quantum-resistant cryptography.

title: Kryptografiske anbefalinger - en veileder fra NSM (guidance document)
description: NSM guidance document version of the cryptographic recommendations under the Security Act framework; covers preparing for quantum-resistant cryptography migration.

title: Kvantedatamaskiner utfordrer dagens kryptoløsninger (Quantum computers challenge today's crypto solutions)
description: NSM opinion/commentary article on how quantum computers challenge current cryptographic solutions and the need for post-quantum migration.

title: NSM åpner senter for anvendt kryptologi (NSM opens centre for applied cryptology)
description: NSM announcement of a Centre for Applied Cryptology to strengthen Norway's quantum-safe preparedness, civil and military.

title: Migrasjon til postkvantekryptografi (Migration to post-quantum cryptography) - conference session 2023
description: NSM security conference 2023 session on migration to post-quantum cryptography.

title: Postkvante algoritmer (Post-quantum algorithms) - conference session 2024
description: NSM security conference 2024 session on post-quantum algorithms and how quantum-secure cryptosystems are based on new mathematical assumptions.

title: Kvantedatamaskiner og kryptografi (Quantum computers and cryptography) - conference session
description: NSM security conference session on quantum computers and cryptography.

title: Slik kvantesikres Norges største hemmeligheter (How Norway's biggest secrets are made quantum-safe) - conference session
description: NSM security conference session on quantum-securing Norway's most sensitive information.

title: Sikkerhet (Security) - Digdir DPI documentation
description: Digitaliseringsdirektoratet (Digdir) security documentation page. Checked: does NOT mention post-quantum/quantum-safe cryptography.

title: Praktiske råd om egenberedskap for betalinger (Practical advice on payment self-preparedness)
description: Norges Bank payment-system preparedness guidance. Borderline - no confirmed explicit PQC reference.

title: Memo 2-2024 crypto-assets web report
description: Norges Bank memo on crypto-assets (cryptocurrencies), not cryptographic algorithms; no PQC reference - excluded.

title: QCNorway - Towards a Norwegian Quantum Computing Strategy (Forskningsradet Prosjektbanken)
description: Research Council of Norway project entry on a Norwegian quantum computing strategy; research-funding context, mentions PQC as a challenge.
